class.name: Struct
class.brief_description: A built-in [Variant] type representing a GDScript struct instance.
class.description: The [Struct] type stores an instance of a struct declared in GDScript with the [code]struct[/code] keyword. Unlike objects, structs have value semantics: assigning a struct to a variable or passing it to a function copies its contents rather than sharing a reference. [b]Note:[/b] Structs are an experimental feature. Their syntax and behavior may change in future versions.

operator.name: operator []
operator.description: Returns the value of the struct member named [param key]. Fails if no member with that name exists.
